name: github_create_or_update_repo_agent_secret
description: Create or update a repository GitHub agent secret (PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/agents/secrets/{secret_name}). Provide plaintext value; the tool fetches the repository public key and encrypts it with LibSodium. Requires collaborator access; classic tokens need repo scope. HTTP 201 created / 204 updated. See GitHub REST Agents secrets.
